name: Magnus for Burgundy Credit Card

rewards.displayRate: 60 EDGE REWARD Points / Rs 200 upto Rs 2 lakh per calendar month, then 35 EDGE REWARD Points / Rs 200

rewards.displayCategory: Eligible spends up to Rs 1.5 lakh per calendar month
Eligible incremental spends above Rs 1.5 lakh per calendar month

domestic: Domestic lounge access requires minimum spends of Rs 50,000 in the previous 3 calendar months; the spend condition is waived for the month of issuance plus the next 3 calendar months.
international: Unlimited domestic and international lounge access applies to primary cardholder; guest visits are limited to 4 domestic guest visits per calendar year and 4 international guest visits per card anniversary year on Priority Pass.

specialSpendRules.notes: Rent spends are eligible only up to Rs 50,000 per calendar month for reward earn and spend-based fee waiver calculation.

joiningBenefitsValued.label: Choose any one voucher worth Rs 5,000 from Luxe, The Postcard Hotels, or Yatra on first transaction within 30 days of card issuance; not applicable on upgrades from Magnus

joiningBenefits: Choose any one voucher worth Rs 5,000 from Luxe, The Postcard Hotels, or Yatra on first transaction within 30 days of card issuance; not applicable on upgrades from Magnus
additionalBenefits: 4 airport meet and assist services per calendar year
Dining Delights offers across partner restaurants
15% savings on bed and breakfast rates at The Leela Palace Hotels & Resorts, valid till 30 September 2026
Fuel surcharge waiver of 1% for transactions between Rs 400 and Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 400 per month

transferPartnerValuations.note: 5 EDGE REWARD Points -> 4 Club ITC points

salaried: Requires an Axis Burgundy relationship at individual level and net salary credit above Rs 3 lakh per month in an Axis Bank salary account, or another eligible Burgundy route
If qualifying via Rs 10 lakh CASA average monthly balance, Burgundy vintage should exceed 3 months and the latest One Glance Statement should reflect eligibility
Card approval remains subject to Axis Bank credit policy
selfEmployed: Requires an Axis Burgundy relationship at individual level and either Rs 30 lakh TRV without demat, or Rs 1 crore TRV including demat, or another eligible Burgundy route
If qualifying via Rs 10 lakh CASA average monthly balance, Burgundy vintage should exceed 3 months and the latest One Glance Statement should reflect eligibility
Card approval remains subject to Axis Bank credit policy

internalNotes: Card details manually audited and verified by agent on 2026-06-25
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-06
Official audit completed on 2026-06-03 using Axis Bank product page, 20 April 2024 revision PDF, 20 June 2025 revision PDF, Magnolia for Burgundy FAQ, and Axis miles-transfer page.
Domestic lounge access requires minimum spends of Rs 50,000 in the previous 3 calendar months; the spend condition is waived for the month of issuance plus the next 3 calendar months.

Unlimited domestic and international lounge access applies to primary cardholder; guest visits are limited to 4 domestic guest visits per calendar year and 4 international guest visits per card anniversary year on Priority Pass.
Travel EDGE earns 60 EDGE REWARD Points per Rs 200 up to cumulative spends of Rs 2 lakh per calendar month; spends above that continue at 35 EDGE REWARD Points per Rs 200.
Accelerated 35 EDGE REWARD Points are earned only on eligible incremental spends above Rs 1.5 lakh in a calendar month, up to assigned credit limit plus Rs 1.5 lakh per calendar month.

Spends on Travel EDGE up to Rs 2 lakh per month, Gyftr, and other Axis accelerated offer portals are excluded from the 35-point accelerated calculation because they already earn separate accelerated rewards.
Rent spends above Rs 50,000 in a calendar month are not considered for accelerated reward points or spend-based fee waiver calculation.
EMI transactions, reversed transactions, fees, charges, interest, and cash withdrawals do not count toward accelerated reward calculations.

Miles transfer ratio for Magnus for Burgundy is 5 EDGE REWARD Points = 4 partner points across eligible transfer partners; current annual transfer cap is 10 lakh EDGE REWARD Points in a calendar year, split as 2 lakh to Group A and 8 lakh to Group B.

Accor Live Limitless, Marriott Bonvoy, and Qatar Airways have been removed from the current Burgundy transfer partner set; British Airways, Finnair, and Vietnam Airlines are available in the current verified list.
Travel-card audit includes full redemption options and current airline and hotel transfer tables from official Axis materials; Gift EDGE redemption is valued at Rs 0.20 per EDGE REWARD Point.
If Burgundy relationship eligibility is not maintained, Axis Bank may replace Magnus for Burgundy with Magnus Credit Card carrying a Rs 12,500 joining and annual fee and a 5:2 partner transfer ratio.
Effective 1 October 2025, unredeemed EDGE REWARD Points may be forfeited 30 days after card closure or if minimum amount due remains outstanding for more than 90 days.
